overview: AU College of Engineering (AUCE), the constituent engineering college of Andhra University, is one of the oldest and most prestigious engineering institutions in India. Located in Visakhapatnam, it is known for its strong academic legacy, expansive campus infrastructure, affordable government-funded education, and consistent placements across core engineering and IT sectors.
accreditation: NAAC A++ Grade (Cycle 4) with CGPA 3.74/4.00; ISO 9001:2015 Certified.

placements.companiesVisited: Amazon, Google (Off-campus), L&T, TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, Medha Servo Drives, ONGC, HPCL
placements.internationalOffers: Limited international/off-campus high-value offers through product-based companies

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech admissions are primarily through AP EAMCET counseling conducted by APSCHE. M.Tech admissions are based on AP PGECET/GATE scores followed by university counseling.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions follow APSCHE counseling schedules and Andhra University academic calendar.

campus.area: Large university campus shared with Andhra University
campus.specialNote: One-time admission and caution deposit fee is approximately ₹9,000. Hostel room rent ranges between ₹5,000 – ₹8,000 annually, while total hostel and mess expenses are approximately ₹40,000 – ₹50,000 per year.

available: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (Full Tuition Fee Reimbursement)
scholarships.details: Eligible BC/SC/ST/EBC/Kapu students with annual family income below ₹2.5 LPA receive tuition reimbursement under JVD. Hostel students can receive ₹20,000 annually under Vasathi Deevena. GATE-qualified M.Tech students receive ₹12,400 per month stipend.

contact.address: AU College of Engineering, Andhra University, Visakhapatnam – 530003, Andhra Pradesh, India
